bullets.text: Coordinated all student support activities for the Public Finance (Taxation) course across three semesters.

Compiled a comprehensive report through literature review, cross-country policy comparison, and data collection to support faculty research on tax design, informing discussions on fiscal equity and efficiency.
Conducted a detailed policy analysis on Australia's family tax benefit system, including its historical development, measurement frameworks, and fiscal impact.
Contributed to broader analysis of social protection policies and women's labor force participation.
Identifying and extracting severance-related variables across multiple SIPP panels (1983–2024) to construct a consistent annual time series of severance receipt data.
Conducting ongoing data cleaning and exploratory analysis in STATA, ensuring cross-year comparability and reliability for future publication.

Facilitated the digital transformation of financial data management and visualization systems by leading the migration of 300+ reporting templates from Excel to an AI-driven platform, reducing processing time by 40%, strengthening real-time outcome tracking, and ensuring system readiness for the annual financial close.
Developed and delivered Management Discussion & Analysis (MD&A) content and financial statement disclosures, supporting transparent reporting of financial performance and position.
Produced analytical reports and disclosures that strengthened accountability and transparency, aligning financial performance narratives with the World Bank's outcome-oriented reporting frameworks.
Analyzed and synthesized financial and economic data to identify performance drivers, providing insights that informed strategic decision-making and development outcomes.
Identified and documented key financial trends and performance drivers, incorporating market insights to support business initiatives, investment decisions, and strategic financial opportunities.

Launched a new SME-focused product by coordinating local sales teams and partnering with IT, driving a digital transformation in client onboarding and service delivery that resulted in 10,000 new clients within 3 months.
Designed the product including its marketing strategy, target analysis, and policy formulation.
Directed the project using PMP methodologies, especially for time and team management.
Led contract negotiation processes with global TMCs and global clients; added over 26 new markets to the portfolio in 6 years and handled all relations related to over 35 markets.
Developed dashboards by analyzing clients' travel policies and revenue potential; increased revenue on targeted O&Ds by over 20% for three consecutive years without increasing incentive cost.
Managed relationships with Fortune 500 companies, including Google, Rolls-Royce, and Mastercard.
Created marketing campaigns for corporate clients and Travel Management Companies (TMCs) at a global level; managed $600k/year budget, monitored actual performance, and analyzed variances.
Organized complex bid activities for the solutions team and ensured the creation and maintenance of bid files; prepared more than 25 solution proposals for EMEA and Turkish smart grid clients.
Represented technical, commercial, and financial aspects during negotiations with international clients such as Saudi Aramco, TANAP, and LEPCO.
Coordinated with legal, tax, and financing experts to prepare comprehensive bids, ensuring compliance with internal and external guidelines.
Defined and investigated market needs, trends, and the portfolio to create and implement the best business approach; contributed to the global marketing portfolio on a bi-monthly basis.

Collaborated with regional teams and sector specialists to design tailored energy and digital grid solutions, improving project success rates and supporting Siemens' global strategy for energy transition and digital transformation.
Developed standardized bid templates and knowledge resources to guide regional proposal teams, capturing lessons learned to strengthen consistency and knowledge transfer.
Integrated resilience and modernization features into proposals — smart grid, digitalization, and secure transmission systems — to enhance energy sector adaptation and reliability.
Crafted detailed business cases for energy infrastructure initiatives, directly contributing to Siemens' global strategy within the energy sector.

highlights: International Business Ethics and Sustainability Case Competition Winner (2025)
Dean's High Honor List with 4.00 GPA
Paper: Economic Analysis of Corporate Expansions and Housing Prices: Amazon HQ2 Case in Arlington
Ranked as the top university / top economics program in Turkey
Dean's High Honor List (4 semesters); Graduated with Honors
Dean's list (2016 & 2017); Graduated with High Honors
Thesis: The Moderating Role of Introversion–Extroversion in the Relationship Between Transformational Leadership and Individual Creativity Across Corporations and Startups
Ranked as the top technical university in Istanbul and the top electrical engineering department in Turkey
Siemens Future Professionals Scholarship, Finansbank Merit Based Scholarship
Thesis: Modeling of the dynamic behavior of squirrel-cage induction motors

bullets.text: Initiated and spearheaded a volunteer team aiming to improve working conditions of employees with disability; reached and positively impacted over 100 disabled employees, fostering a more inclusive and supportive workplace environment physically and emotionally.
Launched a project enabling disabled candidates to apply to the same job ads on the company website.

data: Econometric modeling and regression analysis (OLS, panel data)
Financial modeling and valuation (DCF, M&A analysis)
certifications: Build Project – Building 5 Year Financial Plan (2024)
Build Project – Enterprise Valuation for M&A (2024)
